label: Category generator
description: Generates items drawn from all ThingDefs that are descendants of a ThingCategoryDef. Supports excluding specific defs or sub-categories.

categoryDef.label: Category def
categoryDef.description: ThingCategoryDef whose descendant ThingDefs are eligible for generation.

thingDefCountRange.label: Thing def count range
thingDefCountRange.description: How many distinct ThingDefs to pick from the category per generation pass. Source default IntRange.One.

excludedThingDefs.label: Excluded thing defs
excludedThingDefs.description: ThingDefs explicitly excluded from generation even if they are descendants of categoryDef.

excludedCategories.label: Excluded categories
excludedCategories.description: ThingCategoryDefs whose descendants are excluded from generation.
